description: Style NoteLook trendy and stay comfortable in these Techno Ind floaters from puma. This pair can be teamed with shorts or denims, and t-shirts for a casual ensemble. Product DetailsBlack floater with synthetic upper with synthetic woven tape straps on the forefoot and ankle attached by a diagonal strap across the midfootVelcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for a snug FitDecorative stitched detailing and branding on the strapsCushioned footbed with pattern for all day comfortTPU outsole with circular nubs all over and branding on the midfoot Material and CareSyntheticRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
